verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Mercy mercy Lord Your mercy is how we are restored Mercy O mercy Lord Help us to show Your mercy Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You have been patient with our offenses You have forgiven all of our sings We were deserving only Your judgement But Your great mercy triumphed again

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Mercy mercy Lord Your mercy is how we are restored Mercy O mercy Lord Help us to show Your mercy Lord

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lord You have taught us Love one another As You have loved us So we must love Always forbearing Always forgiving Showing to others The mercy we've known
